Source: Einstein GenAI Developer Guide
URL: https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/einstein/genai/guide
Fetched: 2026-03-19

# Einstein GenAI Developer Guide

## Overview
Part of Agentforce platform. Enables deployment of AI agents working alongside employees.

## Core Capabilities
- Conversational AI integrated with Salesforce
- Trust Layer for secure LLM data connectivity
- Customizable AI assistants

## Development Resources
- APIs & SDKs for building solutions
- Agent Script for Agentforce Builder
- Agentforce DX for pro-code development
- Models & Prompts management via Prompt Builder
